item.title: MA Budget: Community College SUCCESS Fund (7100-4002)
item.description: Anchor page for tracking SUCCESS language, funding, and wraparound-support intent through the budget process.

item.title: Public comment period for Workforce Pell regulations opens
item.description: The U.S. Department of Education issued its proposed rule to govern the expansion of Pell Grants to programs as short as eight weeks.

item.title: MassDHE News Clips: Community Colleges
item.description: MassDHE’s community college clips often surface state-level transfer, workforce, affordability, and funding developments.

item.title: Headlines
item.description: Budget leader proposes massive overhaul of Missouri higher education funding Missouri Independent State Rep. Dirk Deaton, chairman of the House Budget Committee, said he wants to overhaul state support for community colleges and universities by... The post Headlines first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: A quick look at key community college stats
item.description: The number of credentials awarded at community colleges in 2023-24 increased by more than 90,000 from the prior year, according to the just-released Fast Facts 2026 from the American Association of Community Colleges (AACC). Source:... The post A quick look at key community college stats first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: Reporter’s notebook
item.description: New DOL guidance on registered apprenticeships Arizona college keeps expanding into three-year degrees Kansas college to offer its first baccalaureate Concerns about loan services support for students New DOL guidance on registered apprenticeships The U.S.... The post Reporter’s notebook first appeared on Community College Daily .
